name: Collection letter management
fullName: UI ~ Administration TM Receivable: Collection letter management

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
When the user navigates to collection letter
When the user create a collection letter with:
When the user updates the collection letter "<last_collection_letter_name>" with status "Habilitado" with:
When the user finds collection letters with status "Habilitado" within "10" pages:
When the user changes the collection letter state to status "Deshabilitado":
When the user finds collection letters with status "Deshabilitado" within "10" pages:
When the user changes the collection letter state to status "Habilitado":
